full_text:
Xu Tong еҫҗзөұ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Tong (еҫҗзөұ). A distant relative to Xu Yi, succeeded him by order of Cao Pi. Xu Tong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
